title: 9-30-24 90% of Rocky Mountain National Park's Beaver habitat is UNOCCUPIED! Why?! Beavers are cool!!

enrichment.summary: Kyle argues that 90% of beaver habitat in Rocky Mountain National Park sits unoccupied and makes no sense given how easy and cheap it would be to rebuild beaver dams and restock beaver populations. He calls on entrepreneurs, unemployed people, and anyone willing to do the work to go build beaver dams themselves, with or without government approval, and frames beaver restoration as both ecologically obvious and culturally American.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Inexcusable that only 10% is occupied — should be 100%
Don't wait for it; just go build the dam anyway
Beavers are keystone animals that create habitat for many other species
Unemployed people or anyone willing should be paid or volunteer to rebuild beaver habitat
Among the coolest, smartest animals — underrated because they're rodents
